title: Wio Tracker L1 Menu/Enter Button Fix

messages.author: Chris
messages.text: When flashing the Wio Tracker L1, neither the community or Ripple editions allow use of the "enter" button. The "enter" button is assigned to the center joystick click, however the physical joystick actually does not have a center click. There is likely an issue in PlatformIO with how it was first added in the default configuration. I fixed it and opened a PR in the community edition, link here: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/pull/1505 I wanted to share here because I am not sure if the Ripple source code is available. If it is I can make another PR. It's a one-line change.

I fixed it and opened a PR in the community edition, link here: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/pull/1505 I wanted to share here because I am not sure if the Ripple source code is available. If it is I can make another PR. It's a one-line change.
